name: Smart Panel Heater Black 2000W
description:
With a Princess smart panel heater in your room, it doesn't matter where you are - you'll always be in complete control. Just about to leave work and want to warm the front room? On holiday and forgot to switch it off? As long as you've got your mobile and a WiFi connection, you'll have full access to timers, schedules and settings.
A modern, slim design fits right in with any room interior - use it as a freestanding smart heater to move easily between rooms, or mount it on the wall for a more permanent installation. You can also set it manually using the digital control panel, and it's compatible with Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant voice controls too.
Using a smart panel heater is a great way to efficiently heat one room, instead of the entire house. And with so many ways to control it, you'll never end up leaving it on for longer than you need to - no more unnecessary spending on wasted energy use.

• Full control of your heater - from anywhere in the world
• Compatible with HomeWizard Climate smartphone app
• Voice control via Amazon Alexa or Google Assistant
• Touch screen digital display for simple manual control
• Modern and slim design to fit any room interior
• Set timer or schedules for automatic shutdowns
• Freestanding with tip-over protection for peace of mind
• Can be wall-mounted for a more permanent installation
• Child safety lock can be activated via control panel or app
• Comes with UK plug

name: Yale Conexis L2 Smart Door Lock Satin Nickel
description:
• Unlocks with a key card, key tag, phone tag or via the Yale Home App
• Simple to fit - suitable for most PVCu and composite doors between 44-70mm thick
• BSI approved
• Enhanced encrypted security
• Built-in tamper alarm and bank level encryption
• Simple set-up; Yale Connect Wi-Fi Bridge to be set up within 3m of the Yale Smart Door Lock (with module)


The Conexis® L2 Smart Door Lock puts you fully in control, giving you the freedom to secure your home without the need for a key. A complete out of the box solution, the Conexis L2 includes both the Wi-Fi Bridge and module to provide a full Smart experience.

Use a variety of ways to gain access to your home whether it be via a key tag, phone tag or via the Yale Home app. No need to worry about carrying your keys with you - all you need is your smartphone and with one tap, you can unlock the door with ease.

The world's first BSI approved smart lock, the Conexis digital door lock enables you to send users virtual keys so friends & family can gain access to your house if you are not around. Once they've gained access you can manage who can enter your property by disabling or deleting users through the Yale Home app. You can also monitor who comes and goes, and can even receive a notification informing when someone comes home if they use a mobile key. Virtual keys can be scheduled or made permanent for ultimate control of your home or property.

The device uses encrypted Bluetooth smart technology so the smart lock is not dependent on network reception. The lock includes a tamper alarm that will sound if someone attempts to gain access when they shouldn't, offering an additional deterrent.

• Keyless - gives you the freedom to secure your home without the need for a key
• Enhanced encrypted security - the new Yale Home app is protected by 2 factor authentication to prevent unauthorised access
• Battery powered - 4 x AA batteries included; alert given when batteries are running low
• Suitable for doors with a thickness of between 44-70mm 
• Manage multiple doors & properties from one account
• Remote functionalities to unlock and check door status
• Activity monitoring and notifications
• Unlimited number of virtual keys that can be sent to family, friends and visitors
• Connect to the Yale Home App - available on Android and iOS devices
• Integrations with Google Assistant, Amazon Alexa, Philips Hue and Smart Things

Use with the range of Yale Smart Lock accessories:
• Yale Smart Lock Key Tags (code 83971) and (code 24570)
• Yale Smart Lock Phone Tags (code 50261) and (code 92708)

name: Google Nest Battery Camera
description:
Who's in the garden? What's the dog up to? With 24/7 live view and event video history, these Google Nest smart security cameras help you check in on what matters, inside or outside.
Intelligent alerts sent straight to your smartphone will tell you when there's a person, animal or vehicle detected. And they're easy to install - these smart cameras are battery-powered, so there's no wiring required.
Activity Zones let you define specific areas and get notified when something happens there, so you'll only get alerted about things that are important to you - you can respond to alerts directly from the Google Home app.
If your Wi-Fi goes down or there's a power cut, don't panic - Nest Cam will automatically store up to one hour of recorded events in its local memory. When things are up and running again, you'll be able to see exactly what happened.
Nest Cam uses encrypted video, two-step verification and enhanced security through your Google account to help protect your privacy. A green LED light lets you know when the camera is processing or streaming video, while Home and Away routines give you the option of automatically turning your camera off when you're home.

• 24/7 live view - check in to see what's going on
• HDR and night vision - clear video all day and all night
• Activity zones - choose the areas that matter most
• Intelligent alerts - notifies you of people, animals or vehicles
• Instant access - stay in control via the Google Home app
• Stay connected - local memory stores up to one hour of video
• Protect your privacy - enhanced security features
• Battery-powered - easy installation and setup
• IP54 rating - suitable for indoor or outdoor use
• Some features and services may require accounts or subscriptions

ACCESSORIES
• Indoor stand - (code 75676)
• 5m weatherproof cable - (code 73443)
• 10m weatherproof cable - (code 22225)

Place Ring Alarm Motion Detectors in each room of your home to get real-time mobile notifications when motion is detected.

• Set your security in motion - choose to get audio or mobile notifications whenever motion is detected inside your home.
• Smart motion detection settings - can allow you to ignore your pets and detect intruders. [1]
• Easy, tool-free installation - compact design allows for discreet placement in room corners or against flat walls.

* Requires Alarm Base Station.
* Compatible with 1st and 2nd generation Alarm devices and accessories.
 [1] Pet detection: If set at the lowest motion sensitivity setting, from 2.1 metres for pets under 22kg

name: Ring Alarm 2nd Gen Contact Sensor
description:
Get real-time notifications the moment a door or window opens in your home with the Ring Contact Sensor.

• Reliable detection - simply connect to your Alarm Base Station and be notified anytime your windows or doors are opened.
• Easy installation - compact design and includes a removable slim magnet for easy installation on any door or window frame in your home. 
• Instant notification - Choose to get audio or mobile notifications so you’ll always be the first to know whenever your doors or windows are opened.
• Tamper alert - trigger your Alarm if someone tampers with the contact Sensors and system is armed in Away or Home Mode.

* Requires Alarm Base Station.
* Compatible with 1st and 2nd generation Alarm devices and accessories.

name: Ring Floodlight Cam Plus White
description:
Upgrade your outdoor security with Floodlight Cam Plus. Stay connected and protected in almost any weather conditions with 1080p HD Video. Shine a light on large outdoor areas with ultra-bright LED floodlights.

With the Ring app on your phone, you'll be alerted whenever it detects movement – you can even set up your own custom motion zones, letting you focus your security on the areas of your property that matter most. As well as protection, the floodlight can also illuminate pathways and entrances to improve visibility when you walk past at night.

• 1080p HD Video with Ring Vision for crystal clear video clarity
• Colour Night Vision - full colour footage even at night
• Two-Way Talk - communicate with visitors in real time from your device 
• Floodlights with brightness control and a security siren - for intruder security & prevention

• Customisable motion zones - Create, customise and fine-tune your Motion Zones to cover only the areas you care about, so you only receive the notifications that matter most.
• Motion Notifications - Receive instant notifications on your phone or tablet, whether you're on the sofa, at the gym or in the office.

name: Philips Hue Smart Controls Dimmer V2
description:
Philips Hue Control devices.



Control and dim your lights with the Philips Hue Dimmer Switch. Both a wall switch and remote control, this smart switch attaches easily to walls with the included adhesive and can be removed from the magnetic base to use as a remote control.
Brighten and Dim Your Smart Lights - Wirelessly turn your lights up or down via the battery-powered dimmer switch v2. What's Required? - Nothing! You can pair your dimmer switch with your Philips Hue lights with or without a bridge. Instructions included in packaging. Installation-Free Control - Mount or stick the dimmer switch wall plate anywhere in your home and enjoy installation-free smart lighting control. Remote Control - The Hue Dimmer switch is magnetic and can be removed from the base plate, allowing you to use the dimmer switch as a handy remote control.  Switch Between Light Scenes - Toggle through four different light scenes by pressing the "Hue" button. Personalise which scene is assigned to each click via the 'Philips Hue' app.

name: Hive Mini Heating & Hot Water Thermostat Hubless
description:
The Hive Thermostat Mini is part of the next generation of smart heating devices. It works in the background to help you live more sustainably and avoid heating an empty home.

• Beautifully clear - small but perfectly formed, Mini's elegant mirrored design and clear interface blends in with your home
• Easy to use - change the temperature quickly on the thermostat itself, or use the Hive app to set schedules, boost your heating or change to 'holiday' mode
• Automatic frost protection - if the temperature drops below 7°C in your home, Mini can turn on your heating to stop your pipes from freezing
• Box includes Hive Thermostat Mini, receiver, 4x Duracell AAA batteries, user guide, installation guide

Extra Information
• A Hive Hub is not included with this pack. If you require a hub for additional features such as geolocation, schedule creation or one-off heating boosts, choose pack (code 41166)
• New-look Hive Thermostat Mini is not compatible with the interchangeable coloured frames
• Hive Thermostat Mini for Heating and Hot Water must be installed by a qualified professional
• Hive Thermostat Mini for Heating and Hot Water is suitable for homes that have a conventional boiler with a separate water tank. If you have a combi boiler, you'll need the Hive Thermostat Mini for Heating (code 39196)

name: Hive Mini Heating & Hot Water Thermostat
description:
The next generation of smart heating devices! With the Hive Mini Thermostat, you can be in complete control of your home's heating, wherever you are. This small and sleek thermostat works in the background to help you reduce your energy usage.

It's simple to change the temperature on the thermostat itself, but you don't need to be within reach of it to be in total control. With the Hive app on your smartphone, you can set schedules, boost your heating or change to 'holiday' mode from anywhere - perfect for preventing energy waste by unnecessarily heating an empty home.

• Beautifully clear - Mini's elegant mirrored design and clear interface blends in with your home
• Easy to use - change the temperature quickly on the thermostat itself, or use the Hive app to set schedules, boost your heating or change to 'holiday' mode
• Automatic frost protection - if the temperature drops below 7°C in your home, Mini can turn on your heating to stop your pipes from freezing
• Create and edit heating schedules - set up to six daily time slots to heat your home, seven days a week
• Give your heating a one-off boost for up to six hours on chilly days
• Box includes Hive Thermostat Mini, receiver, hub, 4x Duracell batteries AAA, 1x ethernet cable, 1x plug, 1x USB power lead, 1x pack wall plugs, 1x user guide, 1x installation guide

Extra Information
• New-look Hive Thermostat Mini is not compatible with the interchangeable coloured frames
• Hive Thermostat Mini for Heating and Hot Water must be installed by a qualified professional
• This Hive Thermostat Mini is suitable for homes that have a conventional boiler with a separate water tank. If you have a combi boiler, you'll need the Hive Thermostat Mini for Heating (code 88129)
• Works with Alexa, Google Assistant, Siri and IFTTT.
• Supports smart radiator valve integration.
• Energy-saving features including holiday mode and geolocation control.
• Compact design with six daily time slots and one-touch boost mode.

Looking to create ambience and atmosphere for any occasion in your garden or outdoor spaces? You'll love the Impress wall lantern from Philips Hue - not only does it look the part, but it gives you complete control of 16 million colours and shades at your fingertips!
This smart lantern will transform your garden, patio or decking. Want a crisp and bright light to illuminate a pathway? How about some vibrant and colourful lighting to show off your garden features? The Impress wall light can do it all, and it's so easy to operate.

name: Philips Hue Wall Switch Module
description:
Want to use your existing light switches with your Philips Hue smart lights? Simply install this module behind your wall switch, and your light will always stay powered on and reachable.
Use your switch to control a group of smart lights in a room or zone, or to set up to three different light scenes - simply toggle the switch on and off to cycle through the scenes you choose.

• Works with all Philips Hue smart lights
• Keeps lights connected to power and reachable
• Use your switch to control lights, rooms or zones
• Cycle through scenes by toggling the light switch

name: Kinetic Switch 1 Gang Matt Black
description:
Kinetic self-powered switches use micro-energy acquisition technology. It converts your kinetic energy to electric energy when you
push the button. No need to use batteries and no need to connect to mains power. With built-in RF433 modules this creates a remote control from the receiver.

These Innovative kinetic switches can be installed wherever without running additional wires. No need to channel walls; save material cost & engineer labour fee! Eco-friendly.

• Kinetic Switches available in 1, 2 and 3 gang in both white and black finish
• 3 Receivers available to choose from giving increased flexibility
• Curvy Design 
• Matt Black
• IP42
• Flexible installation mount anywhere
• Long lifespan over 100,000 switches
• Waterproof design
• Strong signal with 80m range
• Smart receiver works with mobile and voice assistant
• Quick and easy set-up
• L86 x W86 x H15mm

Requires a receiver for installation:
72322 - Non Dimmable Receiver
21819 - Non Dimmable Wifi/Bluetooth Receiver
74873 - Dimmable Smart Wifi/Bluetooth Receiver

47541 - Fob Switch also available
